name: claude-skills-marketplace
description: Collection of Claude Code skills and plugins including SDLC toolkit, ATAM facilitator, and project management

plugins.name: sdlc-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive Software Development Lifecycle plugin. Covers product design, functional and technical specifications, architecture, and code generation for React and Golang microservices.

plugins.name: atam-facilitator
plugins.description: ATAM (Architecture Tradeoff Analysis Method) workshop facilitator for evaluating architectural quality attributes
